angle_used: Pain: high-profile work needs flawless handoff
subject: Painting that protects your reputation
body:
Hi Saher,

Con-Pro's portfolio is loud — Starbucks Corydon (one of Canada's largest), College Jeanne-Sauvé, East Elmwood LEED Gold. On work that visible, a painting sub leaving a punch list is a client conversation you really don't want.

Ashrah Painting flags slips six days out, Lumia keeps your PM informed (and answers questions on demand), and pro cleaning at handoff means zero surface damage.

Want a 15-minute intro?
signals_used: Con-Pro = since 1969, Winnipeg HQ, 2,500+ projects, Starbucks Corydon, College Jeanne-Sauvé, East Elmwood LEED Gold.
